complex_case_before.notes: Before cleanup, the complex case finished at max_total_iter with strict convergence failing and ratio_req/mu warnings appearing systematically on EV-only stations.

messages_sample: C2 is smoothed mismatch; check C2_rel and dx_end for convergence

complex_case_after.notes: After cleanup, the complex case reaches patience with strict convergence satisfied; ratio_req/mu warnings drop to zero while fast<=slow, low unserved, and light airside presence are preserved.

actions_taken: Reduced the complex-case flow MSA step and surcharge smoothing step, and modestly increased the iteration budget.
Applied strict-mode adaptive damping so a fixed flow_msa_alpha cannot remain more aggressive than classical diminishing MSA late in the run.
Aligned the ratio_req/mu audit with final effective scarcity signals by recording local_mu_kw, grid_mu_kw, mu_total_kw, and local_dual_available per station/time.
Restricted the ratio_req/mu warning to cases where scarcity is actually expected and the effective cap is nearly saturated.
Made the C7 residual use the same nonnegative accumulation clamp as update_accumulation, removing a model-implementation mismatch that was blocking strict convergence.

root_causes_identified: The ratio_req/mu audit was reading only local mu_kw even on EV-only stations where no local shared-power dual exists by construction.
The audit compared high request ratios against a missing local dual instead of the final combined scarcity signal after grid and local components were assembled.
The strict convergence gate was also being held back by a C7 residual computed against unclamped accumulation dynamics while the model itself clamps accumulation at zero.
logic_fixed: Power-tightness diagnostics now record local_mu_kw, grid_mu_kw, mu_total_kw, and local_dual_available.
The ratio_req/mu warning now checks near-saturated effective-cap conditions and the final total scarcity signal instead of blindly expecting a local dual everywhere.
The C7 residual now mirrors update_accumulation by comparing against the clamped next-step accumulation.
warning_cleanup_analysis.residual_warning_explanation: One non-severe audit warning remains (the smoothed C2 mismatch reminder), but the systematic ratio_req high but mu_kw ~ 0 warnings are eliminated through logic alignment rather than threshold hiding.
